title: dryopteris isabellina
intro: Dryopteris isabellina, also known as the lady fern or isabelline fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to Asia and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris isabellina include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, as well as having potential anti-cancer and anti-aging effects. Dryopteris isabellina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and is also used in some herbal remedies to support skin and digestive health.
